log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Round 1: Too far for melee. Spiritual Weapon + ranged.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Aasimar — Winged Striker.
ACTION: Cast Spiritual Weapon (Level 2 slot). melee_spell attack vs Aasimar — Winged Striker.
→ melee_spell attack: [d20:10+3=13 vs AC 14] MISS.
ACTION: Cast Sacred Flame (Level 0). DC 11 DEX save on Aasimar — Winged Striker.
→ Aasimar — Winged Striker: DEX save [d20:12+6=18 vs DC 11] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 14 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Aasimar — Winged Striker: SUCCESS. 18 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.

REASONING: ROUND 1: 5 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.

→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):20+1=21 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):4+1=5 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Mage: WIS save [d20:9+4=13 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 4/5 targets affected.
